issue_body_preview:
### 🐛 The bug

After upgrading to Nuxt RC-13, the Turnstile stopped loading if put in v-if. It can be seen in the Network tab of the browser, that there are no requests toward cloudflare domain. If I use it without v-if, or if I load it first, then put it in v-if it works perfectly.

Edit: Calli
test_description_zh: 在页面中将 Turnstile 组件放置在一个 v-if 条件渲染块中，初始条件为 false。然后通过交互（如点击按钮）将条件切换为 true，使 Turnstile 组件动态挂载，观察 Turnstile 验证码组件是否正常加载并显示。
expected_result_zh: 当 v-if 条件从 false 变为 true 时，Turnstile 组件应正常向 Cloudflare 域名发起请求并成功渲染验证码挑战界面，组件能正常显示和交互。
